text: When the reference electrode is connected to the middle electrolyte chamber, the measured impedance mainly reflects the resistance from the cathode to middle chamber, which we defined as R1.
original_text: When the reference electrode is connected to the middle electrolyte chamber, the measured impedance mainly reflects the resistance from the cathode to middle chamber, which we defined as R1.

text: When the reference electrode is connected to the anode side, the measured impedance reflects the resistance of the 4-cell, which we defined as R3.
original_text: When the reference electrode is connected to the anode side, the measured impedance reflects the resistance of the 4-cell, which we defined as R3.
